Interface ProgramConstruct

All Superinterfaces:
Branch, Declaration, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, Expression, ExpressionContainer, ExpressionStatement, IExecutionContext, IForUpdates, IGuard, ILoopInit, IObserverFunction, IProgramMethod, IProgramVariable, Label, LoopInitializer, MemberDeclaration, MemberReference, MethodName, ModelElement, Named, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NameReference, NonTerminalProgramElement, Operator, PackageReferenceContainer, ProgramElement, Reference, ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, Sorted, SortedOperator, SourceElement, Statement, StatementContainer, SyntaxElement, TerminalProgramElement, TerminalSyntaxElement, TypeReference, TypeReferenceContainer, TypeReferenceInfix
All Known Implementing Classes:
ProgramSV
public interface ProgramConstruct extends ILoopInit, IForUpdates, IGuard, Label, ExpressionStatement, TypeReference, IProgramVariable, IProgramMethod, Branch, IExecutionContext, MethodName
A type that implement this interface can be used in all java programs instead of an expression or statement. For example class SchemaVariable implements this interface to be able to stand for program constructs.
